description: Raw telemetry for a specific well and TD stage.
sql:
SELECT * FROM (
WITH bounds AS (
  SELECT CAST(stage_start_ts AS timestamp) AS start_ts,
         CAST(stage_end_ts AS timestamp) AS end_ts
  FROM featurestore:merged_td_stage_index_v1
  WHERE name = :well_name AND stage_num_td = CAST(:stage_num AS DOUBLE PRECISION)
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  CAST(t.name AS TEXT) || ':' || CAST(t.record_ts AS TEXT) AS telemetry_point_id,
  t.name AS well_name,
  t.record_ts AS timestamp,
  CAST(:stage_num AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS stage_num,
  t.press_mainline,
  t.rate_slurry,
  t.prop_conc_blend_denso AS selected_concentration
FROM datastore:merged_fleet_stream_customer_full_v2 t
CROSS JOIN bounds b
WHERE t.name = :well_name
  AND t.record_ts >= b.start_ts
  AND t.record_ts <= b.end_ts
ORDER BY t.record_ts
) q
